name: goreview
description: Named Go engineering perspectives review code with cited deductions, deliberated fixes, and verified verdicts.

interface.shortDescription: Named Go judges explain every deduction
interface.longDescription: Run independent named Go engineering perspectives over a change, receive cited deduction scorecards, and optionally deliberate, fix, verify, and re-review.
defaultPrompt: Use GoLegends to review my current Go diff.
Use GoLegends to fix issues in my current Go diff.
